channel.title: GitHub MDX Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of MDX in GitHub

item.title: huggingface/course
item.description: The Hugging Face course on Transformers

item.title: twbs/bootstrap
item.description: The most popular HTML, CSS, and JavaScript framework for developing responsive, mobile first projects on the web.

item.title: dair-ai/Prompt-Engineering-Guide
item.description: 🐙 Guides, papers, lecture, notebooks and resources for prompt engineering

item.title: mintlify/starter
item.description: 📖 The starter kit for your Mintlify docs

item.title: cloudflare/cloudflare-docs
item.description: Cloudflare’s documentation

item.title: huggingface/agents-course
item.description: This repository contains the Hugging Face Agents Course.

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules
item.description: 📄 Configuration files that enhance Cursor AI editor experience with custom rules and behaviors

item.title: react-native-elements/react-native-elements
item.description: Cross-Platform React Native UI Toolkit

item.title: npm/documentation
item.description: Documentation for the npm registry, website, and command-line interface.

item.title: shuding/cobe
item.description: 5kB WebGL globe lib.

item.title: microsoft/teams-ai
item.description: SDK focused on building AI based applications and extensions for Microsoft Teams and other Bot Framework channels

item.title: withastro/docs
item.description: Astro documentation

item.title: hashicorp/web-unified-docs
item.description: Hashicorp Unified Docs

item.title: ton-community/ton-docs
item.description: User-friendly documentation for newcomers to TON blockchain.

item.title: greatfrontend/top-javascript-interview-questions
item.description: Top JavaScript interview questions and answers for Front End Engineers in 2025

item.title: uidotdev/usehooks
item.description: A collection of modern, server-safe React hooks – from the ui.dev team

item.title: MetaMask/metamask-docs
item.description: Developer documentation for MetaMask

item.title: huggingface/deep-rl-class
item.description: This repo contains the Hugging Face Deep Reinforcement Learning Course.

item.title: ClickHouse/clickhouse-docs
item.description: Official documentation for ClickHouse - the fastest and most resource efficient real-time data warehouse and open-source database.
